examples: Leaf blade oblanceolate, to 20 cm, apex obtuse or rounded.
Leaves diffuse along the stem or subrosulate, oblanceolate, cuspidate, 3 – 6 x 1 – 2,4 cm, 6 - 8 mm thick, green, margin red.
Leaves alternate, oblanceolate, obtuse, sessile, semiterete; flowering branches simple, erect, sparsely leafy, 5 – 12 (- 15) cm.
